LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER RADWA MOUSTAFA'S MOTION TO SEAL CASE IS DENIED. MS. MOUSTAFA HAS FAILED TO SATISFY HER BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT HER MOTION MEETS THE REQUIREMENTS OF CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 2.550. NOR HAS MS. MOUSTAFE SHOWN THAT SHE HAS BEEN HARMED BY THE AVAILABILITY OF THIS CASE TO THE PUBLIC. NO INFORMATION HAS BEEN PROVIDED THAT MS. MOUSTAFA HAS SUFFERED ANY HARM BY THE INCLUSION OF THIS CASE IN A WEBSITE. IF MS. MOUSTAFA IDENTIFIES A DOCUMENT THAT WAS FILED IN THIS CASE THAT INCLUDES HER SOCIAL SECURITY NUMBER, THE PORTION OF THAT DOCUMENT THAT INCLUDES HER SOCIAL SECURITY NUMBER WILL BE SEALED AND A REDACTED PORTION FILED INSTEAD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: LAURA A. REDING, CSR 	711 =302/HK

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING MOTION TO DENY OR TAX COSTS IS GRANTED. ALL COSTS CLAIMED BY PETITIONER RADWA MOUSTAFA ARE TAXED. EVEN ASSUMING THAT MS. MOUSTAFA'S COSTS MEMORANDUM CAN AND SHOULD BE DEEMED TIMELY FILED, NONE OF THE COSTS CLAIMED THEREIN ARE RECOVERABLE PER THE COSTS STATUTES. COURT RETAINS JURISDICTIONS AND MS. MOUSTAFA MAY BRING A MOTION TO SEAL IN REGULAR TIME AND FASHION. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Case
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSHUA ROOM, DEPUTY ATTY. GENERAL, TEL. NO. 1-415-703-1299 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: Petitioner Radwa Moustafa's motion to seal case is denied. Ms. Moustafa has failed to satisfy her burden of showing that her motion meets the requirements of California Rule of Court 2.550. Nor has Ms. Moustafe shown that she has been harmed by the availability of this case to the public. No information has been provided that Ms. Moustafa has suffered any harm by the inclusion of this case in a website. If Ms. Moustafa identifies a document that was filed in this case that includes her social security number, the portion of that document that includes her social security number will be sealed and a redacted portion filed instead. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =302/hk
* * *
The court called this matter three times on the record with Ms. Moustafa appearing around 10:10 a.m though court call (Tel. No. 1-415-501-0253). The court has already signed the order the second time that it was called. Mr. Room is still in the court room when the matter was called the third time around. The court gave Mr. Moustafa the opportunity to argue. The court confirmed its previous order.

Notice Of Motion To Seal Case
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Radwa Mohamed Moustafa (415.501.0253) appears via telephone as self-represented petitioner/moving party

Deputy Attorney General, Joshua Room of the California Department of Justice (415.703.1299) appears as counsel for respondent/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER RADWA MOUSTAFA'S Motion To Seal Case is DENIED without prejudice to being refiled on proper notice per CCP 1005 and with supporting evidence as required by CRC 2.550. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice Of Motion; Motion To Deny Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jan-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Radwa M. Moustafa (415.501.0253) appears via telephone as petitioner/opposing party, In Propria Persona

Deputy Attorney General, Joshua Room of the California Department of Justice, appears as counsel for respondent/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

RESPONDENT BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING Motion To Deny Or Tax Costs is GRANTED. All costs claimed by petitioner Radwa Moustafa are taxed. Even assuming that Ms. Moustafa's costs memorandum can and should be deemed timely filed, none of the costs claimed therein are recoverable per the costs statutes. Court retains jurisdictions and Ms. Moustafa may bring a motion to seal in regular time and fashion. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issuance Of Peremtory Writ Of Mandate And Prohibition
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Radwa Mohamed Moustafa (415-501-0253) appears as petitioner/moving party, In Propria Persona

Deputy Attorney General, Joshua Room of the California Department of Justice (415-703-1299) appears as counsel for respondent/opposing party, Board of Registered Nursing

The matter is passed and called for hearing. Having read all papers, Court indicates to the parties in open forum that it agrees with plaintiff, Ms. Moustafa. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PETITIONER RADWA MOUSTAFA'S Motion For Issuance Of Peremtory Writ Of Mandate And Prohibition is GRANTED. The matter is remanded to the Board of Registered Nursing for reconsideration in light of the Court's determination that the statute applies to multiple, unlimited convictions that have received 1203.4 treatment. This ruling is stayed 60 days from this date to allow respondent time to prepare and file an appeal. Counsel for respondent is directed to submit a proposed written order tracking the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
